name_cn:
Chanel 22k Evening Bag
Size: 11x9x4.5(cm)
Black diamond heavy handmade ❤️ In stock 💥💥💥 Chanel 🍷 Come if you love bags! Top-tier 22K Evening Bag, it's here!
#chanel22k Evening Bag I finally saw the real thing! It's so beautiful! Full of details and a premium feel.
The front is full of classic Chanel elements creating a premium feel.
Pearl chain, leather chain, diamond chain ~ 100 points, interpreting perfection.
